buggy_01.py.description: unused_var is assigned but never used
tax is assigned but never used
debug_flag is assigned but never used
temp is assigned but never used

buggy_02.py.description: bare except clause catches all exceptions silently

buggy_03.py.description: len(numbers) can be 0 if list is empty
concatenation fails if first or last is None
b can be zero, no guard

buggy_04.py.description: use 'is True' or truthiness instead of '== True'

buggy_05.py.description: slice misses last element, should be lst[-n:]
second if should be elif to avoid overwriting min clamp
seen should be a set for O(1) lookup

buggy_06.py.description: file opened but never closed, no context manager
file opened but never closed, no context manager

buggy_07.py.description: string interpolation in SQL query is unsafe
age must be str for concatenation, will fail if int

buggy_08.py.description: get_discount returns None implicitly when user_type is unrecognized
find_user has no explicit return None
validate returns None for non-int non-str types

buggy_09.py.description: balance is class-level, shared across instances
transactions list is shared across instances
withdraw has no check for negative balance
__eq__ crashes if other is None or not a Point
